title: The Elf Girl and the Knight's Vow
overview: A knight dies and is reincarnated into a baby Behemoth, an S-rank monster that looks just like a cat! A novice D-rank adventurer, Aria, adopts him as her kitty cat!

title: The Tigris-ear Blacksmith & A Brand New Skill
overview: Aria and Tama visit the armor shop of their familiar blacksmith, Vulcan, to have Tama's armor tailored.

title: Urgent Quest - Defeat the Demons!
overview: Disappearances plague the neighboring town of Lenard and the demon, Beryl, is behind it all. Aria accepts a quest to save the people in trouble.

title: Awaken - Behemoth!
overview: Tama takes on the earth dragon, his fated enemy, in order to save Aria from the brink of death. Tama turns into a real behemoth!

title: Elf Girl & Dragon Girl
overview: Stella continues making passes at Tama with her telepathic skills. Meanwhile, Tama feels uneasy as he watches her fight, driven by her old earth dragon instincts.

title: Girls of the Wandering Woods
overview: The group is caught up in a new forest labyrinth. Tama and Aria are excited to explore an untouched earth said to be full of rare materials and rarer treasure chest.

title: Undead on Approach - Dark Tales of the Earl
overview: Aria and friends desperately search for Lily and Feri. According to Vulcan, the Earl of Gladstone is rumored to be kidnapping young, beautiful women.

title: The Elf Girl Makes a Move
overview: Lily and Feri join Aria's party. Aria is rewarded with a promotion to A-Rank Adventurer! Meanwhile, Tama unlocks the ability to evolve into his third behemoth form.

title: Fated Reunion in the Imperial City!
overview: By invitation of the emperor, Aria and company travel to the imperial city of Klareal. There they meet legendary hero Prince Julius and the Holy Demoness Belzebuth.

title: The Powers of Tama and Aria
overview: With news that one of the Demonic Four has returned to the labyrinth in Ruine, Aria's party, Julius, and Cedric's knights make way for its deepest depths.

title: The Philosopher's Stone and the Secret of Lumines
overview: After escaping to the demon world, Vasaago's next stop is Aria's birthplace: Lumines. His target? The Philosopher's Stone.

title: Sacred Blade & Beast
overview: The battle against Vasaago for the fate of the world has begun. Tama evolves into his third behemoth form and takes to the skies with Aria to retaliate!
